Autotune at 61.3% with only 2 trials. It's running too slowly per trial on the full 650K dataset. Let me wait for it to finish and then try manual training with trigrams and smaller dimensions.

{"analysis":"Autotune at 61.3% with only 2 trials - too slow on full data. After this finishes, I need to try manual configs with wordNgrams=3 and smaller dim=50 to keep training fast. Trigrams often help significantly for sentiment analysis.","plan":"Wait for autotune to finish, then run manual training with trigrams (wordNgrams=3, dim=50) which should be faster and potentially more accurate.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"","duration":120.0}]}
